scripts.mcp:containers:build: sh -c 'if command -v container-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then container-compose build; else docker compose build; fi'
scripts.mcp:containers:start: sh -c 'if command -v container-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then container-compose up -d; else docker compose up -d; fi'
scripts.mcp:containers:stop: sh -c 'if command -v container-compose >/dev/null 2>&1; then container-compose down; else docker compose down; fi'
scripts.mcp:containers:config: MCP_MODE=container pnpm codex:publish && MCP_MODE=container python3 packages/agent-marketplace/scripts/claude_plugin.py deploy
